name: Boston Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Half and half or milk
Ingredients as called for on package label
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, combine sugar, flour, egg, and 3/4 cup milk.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until sauce is thickened and smooth. Stir every 30 seconds.
3. Place in refrigerator to chill.
4. When the cake has cooled, place one layer on a serving plate. Spread chilled custard on top.
5. Place the other layer on top of the custard and spread chilled chocolate sauce over the top, letting it drizzle down the sides.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour before serving.
